title: OKE: Privileged Kubernetes Workload Detection Rule
description: Scheduled-rule-safe count of privileged Kubernetes workload indicators such as hostPID, hostPath, DaemonSet creation, and pod exec leading to node access.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and ('Span Attributes' like '*privileged=true*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*hostPID=true*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*hostPath=*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*subresource=exec*' or 'Process Command Line' like '*kubectl exec*' or 'Process Command Line' like '*nsenter*') | stats count as PrivilegedWorkloadEvents by 'Attack ID', 'Attack Stage', 'Host Name'
